character.name: A mysterious futuristic gunslinger wandering a sci-fi frontier desert. He wears a wide-brim cowboy hat, a long weathered tech-poncho, armored boots, a half-mask covering his lower face, and a glowing energy revolver at his hip. His outfit mixes classic western gunslinger style with advanced sci-fi materials, subtle neon accents, and worn desert gear. He looks calm, dangerous, solitary, and unreadable, like a bounty hunter with a hidden past.
